quote: Every morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most
The longest journey begins with a single step.
Everybody is a genius. But if you judge a fish by its ability to climb a tree, it will live its whole life believing it is stupid.
Thoughts are giant-powers. They are more powerful than electricity. They control your life, mould your character, and shape your destiny.
Yoga is not an ancient myth buried in oblivion. It is the most valuable inheritance of the present. It is the essential need of today and the culture of tomorrow
A journey of a thousand leagues begins beneath one’s feet.
Be the change you wish to see in the world.
Your own Self-realization is the greatest service you can render the world.
Illness begins with "I", Wellness begins with "we.
Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Wise men speak because they have something to say; fools because they have to say something.
Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to pause and reflect.
Change your thoughts and you change your world.
The person who says it cannot be done should not interrupt the person who is doing it.
When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
When everything seems to be going against you, remember that the airplane takes off against the wind, not with it.
Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty. Anyone who keeps learning stays young. The greatest thing in life is to keep your mind young.
Memory is deceptive because it is colored by todays events
The mind is everything. What you think you become.
Knowing others is wisdom, knowing yourself is Enlightenment.
If I have seen further than others, it is by standing upon the shoulders of giants.
This most beautiful system of the sun, planets and comets, could only proceed from the counsel and dominion of an intelligent and powerful Being.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
Where the spirit does not work with the hand, there is no art.
Mathematics is the language with which God has written the universe.
You cannot teach a man anything; you can only help him find it within himself.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
The whole is more than the sum of its parts.
Quality is not an act; it is a habit.
The day science begins to study non-physical phenomena; it will make more progress in one decade than in all the previous centuries of its existence.
If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.
The scientists of today think deeply instead of clearly. One must be sane to think clearly, but one can think deeply and be quite insane.
My brain is only a receiver, in the Universe there is a core from which we obtain knowledge, strength and inspiration.
So astounding are the facts in this connection, that it would seem as though the Creator, himself had electrically designed this planet…
One thing only I know, and that is that I know nothing.
Education is the kindling of a flame, not the filling of a vessel.
I cannot teach anybody anything, I can only make them think.
Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
The greatest danger for most of us is not that our aim is too high and we miss it, but that it is too low and we reach it.
Genius is eternal patience.
If you cannot do great things, do small things in a great way
Silence is better than unmeaning words.
Friends are as companions on a journey, who ought to aid each other to persevere in the road to a happier life.
Nature uses as little as possible of anything.
I much prefer the sharpest criticism of a single intelligent man to the thoughtless approval of the masses.
Music is the mediator between the spiritual and the sensual life.
A man who dares to waste one hour of time has not discovered the value of life.
A man's friendships are one of the best measures of his worth.
Intelligence is the ability to adapt to change.
Not only does God play dice, but... he sometimes throws them where they cannot be seen.
Science cannot solve the ultimate mystery of nature. And that is because, in the last analysis, we ourselves are a part of the mystery that we are trying to solve.
Words empty as the wind are best left unsaid.
To know that we know what we know, and to know that we do not know what we do not know, that is true knowledge.
Without music, life would be a mistake.
There are no facts, only interpretations.
Life is really simple, but men insist on making it complicated.
Wherever you go, go with all your heart.
The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
Stop acting so small. You are the universe in ecstatic motion.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken
The only difference between the saint and the sinner is that every saint has a past, and every sinner has a future.
You can't cross the sea merely by standing and staring at the water.
Don't limit a child to your own learning, for he was born in another time.
Love does not claim possession, but gives freedom.
Not all those who wander are lost.
Faithless is he that says farewell when the road darkens.
All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
It's kind of fun to do the impossible.
There is nothing impossible to him who will try.
Experience is the teacher of all things.
Veni, vidi, vici. (I came, I saw, I conquered.).
Impossible is a word to be found only in the dictionary of fools.
It is not the strongest of the species that survive, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
You can't separate peace from freedom because no one can be at peace unless he has his freedom.
I have never met a man so ignorant that I couldn't learn something from him.
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
Failure is unimportant. It takes courage to make a fool of yourself.
The trouble is, you think you have time
I destroy my enemies when I make them my friends.
There is no way to happiness. Happiness is the way.
Whether you think you can or you think you can’t, you’re right.
Remember that not getting what you want is sometimes a wonderful stroke of luck.
Certain things catch your eye, but pursue only those that capture the heart.
To conquer oneself is a greater victory than to conquer thousands in a battle.

Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things that you didn’t do than by the ones you did do, so throw off the bowlines, sail away from safe harbor, catch the trade winds in your sails. Explore, Dream, Discover.
Love is the absence of judgment.
